title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 108.532 - Allocation of state ceiling, law applicable, when
text:
108.532.  Allocation of state ceiling, law applicable, when. — Sections 108.500 to 108.532 shall govern the allocation of the state ceiling for each calendar year commencing after December 31, 1987.
(L. 1987 S.B. 351 § 108.527) 
Effective 1-01-88
